title: column with date type
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test2(id BIGINT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, birthdate DATE NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test2(id, name, birthdate) VALUES(1, 'Alice', '2023-02-28');
INSERT INTO test2(id, name, birthdate) VALUES(2, 'Bob', NULL);
INSERT INTO test2(id, name, birthdate) VALUES(3, 'Charlie', NULLIF('invalid-date', 'invalid-date'));
SELECT * FROM test2 WHERE birthdate IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: inserting invalid date format into date column
